UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT BALWANTSINH THAKOR'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO ALL CAUSES OF ACTION TO ALLEGE EITHER (1) FACTS SHOWING AGENCY AND/OR ALTER EGO; OR (2) SPECIFIC WRONGFUL ACTS OR FAILURE TO ACT BY THE MOVING DEFENDANT. DEMURRER TO THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS ON THE GROUND THAT THAT NO INTENT IS ALLEGED IS OVERRULED, INTENT/RECKLESS DISREGARD IS SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGED PROVIDED P CAN CURE THE DEFICIENCY ADDRESSED ABOVE. MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER APPROVED AS TO FORM. JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, NOT REPORTED

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Dec-12-2013 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-26-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Christopher B. Allard, Esq. of Bennett Samuelsen et al, (510-444-7688), for Balwantsinh Thakor, Defendant and moving party.
Stephanie A. Foster, Esq. of Hoosmand Law Group, (415-318-5709), for Diane La Rosa, Plaintiff and opposing party.

ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT BALWANTSINH THAKOR's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND as to all causes of action to allege either (1) facts showing agency and/or alter ego; or (2) specific wrongful acts or failure to act by the moving defendant. Demurrer to the cause of action for Intentional Infliction of Emotional Distress on the ground that that no intent is alleged is OVERRULED, intent/reckless disregard is sufficiently alleged provided P can cure the deficiency addressed above. Moving party to prepare order approved as to form. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)
